ModMetaData.name: Odyssey Shuttle Variants
ModMetaData.author: Luke
ModMetaData.description:
Expands the Odyssey transport-shuttle system with distinct buildable variants (cargo / troop / mechanitor), a tiered engine research tree, and (planned) independent crew and cargo capacity.
Multiplayer-compatible.
Portions of the materials used to create this content/mod are trademarks and/or copyrighted works of Ludeon Studios Inc. All rights reserved by Ludeon. This content/mod is not official and is not endorsed by Ludeon.
